title: Desert Panorama + Shaders
description: Makes Your Panorama with Desert with Shaders!
body:
Makes Your Panorama to be Desert with Shaders!

Mod for blurry effect ->[Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus),

Shaders used for custom Panorama ->[ComplementaryReimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined).
